name: The Gatehouse
description: Immense stone blocks form the gatehouse before you; workmanship built to outlast kingdoms,
not mere generations.  Enormous bronze doors stand open.  If ever they were intended to
close to the outside then their counterweights are long locked in place. The few carved
reliefs depict dwarves: harvesting wheat, tending strange gardens, raising overflowing mugs.
Moss and lichen have taken hold where they dare.

outcomes.text: Dust, and the smell of old grain. Nothing obvious.

success.text: Humanoid footprints of various sizes can be spotted leading into and away from the doors.

failure.text: You turn over every stone. Nothing.

criticalSuccess.text: The barrel goes over easily — and its false bottom gives way, scattering coin across the flagstones.

success.text: The barrel grinds aside. A few coins roll loose from beneath it.

failure.text: The barrel refuses to budge, and you nearly wrench your back trying.
